activated_rules.rule_name: LC exception inactive - checking all points
General goods description with invoice reference

consignor.certificate_value:
Skylotec Nordic AB
Sagbäcksvägen 13
SE-437 31 , LINDOME
Sweden
consignor.invoice_value:
SKYLOTEC Nordic AB
Kontorsvägen 6
246 43 Löddeköpinge
Sweden
consignor.motivation: Consignor 'Skylotec Nordic AB' from Sweden as stated in the certificate was explicitly found in the invoice as 'SKYLOTEC Nordic AB' with consistent country Sweden. Despite address differences, company name and country matched and no contradictions found. The name match via explicit text in invoice corporate identity and VAT registration supports MATCH under 4.1.0 and 4.1.4.

consignee.certificate_value:
PARAMAHANSA DEFENCE LLP
F-68, First Floor, Sector-11 (UP)
201301
NOIDA
India
consignee.invoice_value:
Paramahansa Defence LLP
F-68,First Floor, Sector-11 (UP)
NOIDA, 201301
India
consignee.motivation: Consignee 'Paramahansa Defence LLP' from India as stated in the certificate matches exactly with the invoice's bill-to and ship-to addresses, both in company name and country. The certifcate consignee was found in the primary billing fields of the invoice, supporting MATCH according to 4.2.0 and 4.2.3.

goods_description.certificate_value:
POA-030-1, 1 PCS (SE)
ICX POWER ASCENDER,COMPLETE, EU VER
goods_description.invoice_value: POA-030-1 ICX POWER ASCENDER,COMPLETE, EU VER
goods_description.motivation: Article number 'POA-030-1' in certificate matches exactly with invoice article number. The description text 'ICX POWER ASCENDER,COMPLETE, EU VER' matches exactly in invoice. Additionally, the certificate refers to invoice number '209542' in remarks with invoice date; thus general goods description with invoice reference rule 4.3.5 is applied leading to MATCH.

quantity.certificate_value:
1 PALLET, TOTAL WEIGHT 14 KG GW
12,5 KG NW
quantity.invoice_value: 1 pallet 60x40x39, total weight 14 kg GW / NW 12,5 kg
quantity.motivation: Quantity refers to '1 PALLET' and weights 14 KG GW and 12,5 KG NW in the certificate matching exactly to invoice's identical weight and pallet information. The total weight and net weight match numerically and by unit with invoice, and the pallet quantity is verified. Therefore, quantity verification passed under 4.4.3.2 and 4.4.4.

origin.motivation: Certificate origin is 'EUROPEAN COMMUNITY' which under EU origin normalization corresponds to 'Sweden' in the invoice origin field. The invoice explicitly states 'Country of origin: SE'. This satisfies EU origin normalization rule 4.5.4.1, leading to MATCH.

overall_assessment.decision_summary: All critical control points match exactly or within allowed normalization; no contradictions found. Document pair verification is successful.
overall_assessment.human_explanation: Alla kontrollpunkter stämmer överens mellan certifikatet och fakturan och dokumenten kan godkännas automatiskt.
